name: Ham Head
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay the ham on a plate.
2. Cut a small slice off the back of each egg half so the egg sits flat. Place the eggs on the ham for eyes.
3. Lay the pickle slices on the ham for mouth.
4. Cut the pimento into thin slices and place them on the whites of the eggs for bloodshot eyes.
5. Lay 5 black olives inside the pickles for teeth.
6. Cut the round ends off 2 olives. Place these in the centers of the egg yolks for pupils of the eyes.
7. Place the carrot pieces on each side of the ham slice for ears.
8. Lay strips of string cheese above the ham to represent hair.
